query: Part 2.2 requires not less than 10 minutes battery autonomy at end-of-life, but Part 3.1 witnesses only an 8-minute battery discharge test. Which duration governs factory and site acceptance?
Does the ADD-001 revision of minimum COP to 6.3 apply to chiller units already released for manufacture against PO-4500012303, or only to units not yet released?
response: ADD-001 governs all units not yet shipped. Resubmit performance data demonstrating COP >= 6.3 at AHRI conditions.

query: CX-FSS-201 door-fan test failed with 27 Pa peak against the 25 Pa cap. The Section does not state a retest protocol after enclosure sealing remediation. Please confirm retest criteria per NFPA 2001 Annex C.
